details: High-asset divorce client from Ryan Magath (forensic accountant NJ). No money management experience. First lead from referral pipeline.
advisorApproach: Warm intro through Ryan. Focus on wealth protection post-divorce, investment basics, fresh start planning.

activities.action: Lead created via Ryan Magath referral

triggerEvent: Miami CPA serving $500K+ income entrepreneurs - no advisor partnership
details: Brickell CPA firm. Act 60 specialist, high-income entrepreneurs, global investors. Founded 2009. No existing advisor partnership.

advisorApproach: Hi Edgar, your Big 4 background and client base in construction/freight would pair well with my practice. Many business owners need both tax and wealth planning.

details: Brickell Accountants, 800 Brickell Ave. Attorney + CPA dual credentials. International clients since 1980. FIRPTA and cross-border wealth focus.

triggerEvent: IRS resolution CPA - clients rebuilding wealth post-crisis
details: Virtual firm. IRS problem resolution, financial modeling, veteran-focused. Modern approach, likely open to partnerships.

triggerEvent: 40-year Aventura dental practice - succession planning needed
details: Aventura Dental Arts LLC. Senior partner since 1986. Age ~60. Income $500K-1M+. Specialty esthetic/implant practice. No financial advisor mentioned.
advisorApproach: Dr. Grillo, you've built Aventura Dental Arts over nearly 40 years. As you think about the next 5-10 years, have you started planning how to transition the practice or diversify wealth beyond the business?

details: Co-founded Honey (PayPal $4B acquisition 2020). Just sold Venetian Islands home $18.5M March 2026. Starting new venture Pie. Late 30s-40s.
advisorApproach: Ryan, congrats on the Venetian Islands sale and building Pie. As a founder post-exit, are you working with anyone helping balance startup grind with personal wealth diversification?
